name: JONAS L.A.
overview: Brothers Kevin, Joe and Nick Lucas are global rock stars — the band JONAS! When the trio aren't on tour, the guys live in New Jersey on Jonas Street (the inspiration for the band's name) with their parents, Tom and Sandy, and little brother Frankie. They attend Horace Mantis Academy with their childhood friend Stella Malone, who offers the boys endless style tips, and her best friend, star athlete Macy Misa.
